items.title: Dispersion Trading 101: Correlation, Variance, and the “Index vs Components” Game
items.excerpt: A two-asset, trader-friendly primer on dispersion: how correlation changes index variance, how to visualize the wedge, and how pros think about implied vs realized correlation.

items.title: Autocall - How to hedge?
items.excerpt: A single-stock autocall is not “short vol” as a lifestyle choice. It’s a delta/gamma/vega rotate as spot moves, time passes, skew breathes, and rates shift discounting

items.title: Gamma: Why Traders Buy High and Sell Low
items.excerpt: Long gamma means buying weakness and selling strength. A clean intuition for volatility harvesting.

items.title: Risk Neutral Pricing (Without the Confusion)
items.excerpt: Why option pricing uses a fake world — and why that’s perfectly logical.

items.title: Basket Options and the Correlation Trap
items.excerpt: Why baskets break lognormal assumptions and why correlation really matters.
